tools.name: score
tools.description: Return a LITE reading of a brand's AI Citability — a fast, open estimate of how discoverable and citable it is in AI answers (its Brand Discovery Intelligence / BDI snapshot). Mirror measures at two declared levels: LITE estimates, FULL measures. This tool is LITE: it returns a grade band (Below Ave

tools.name: reflect
tools.description: Generate a brand's full Brand Reflection — the complete AI-citability diagnosis: AI Citability Score (ACS), AEO/GEO/SEO scores, executive summary, top opportunity, quick wins, brand-excellence answers, themes, and prioritized findings. Returns a link to the rendered Brief (ready in ~90–120s) — open

tools.name: studio
tools.description: Generate Mirror Studio output from a Reflection that has already been run — a discovery Plan, answer-first Copy, a Brand Communication page plan, or a Media Plan. Requires the `briefId` returned by `reflect`; this tool CONSUMES a completed Reflection and never re-measures or re-scores it. Measuremen

tools.name: aci55
tools.description: Look up The ACI 55 — Daniels AI's published index of 55 leading brands ranked by AI Citability Score (ACS), the benchmark for Brand Discovery Intelligence (BDI) across answer engines (AEO), generative AI (GEO), and search (SEO). Call with NO arguments to get the full ranking (rank, brand, category,

tools.name: request_record
tools.description: Request a Brand Discovery Record — the human-approved source of truth a brand provides to AI assistants and agents, maintained by Mirror. A Record is a machine-readable reference page, hosted by Mirror, stating a brand's verified facts with schema.org structured data and citations, and linking to th

tools.name: mcp_engine
tools.description: Measure a brand's presence on the MCP Engine — the 4th engine of brand discovery. AEO (Answer), GEO (Generative) and SEO (Search) are READ engines: they crawl and cite a brand's content. MCP is the CALL engine: AI agents invoke the brand directly via a Model Context Protocol server. This tool determ

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "request_record" stacks urgency/override words (important, immediately). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Request a Brand Discovery Record — the human-approved source of truth a brand provides to AI assistants and agents, maintained by Mirror. A Record is a machine-…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: score · Private data: request_record · Public sink: reflect · Destructive: score, studio.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: score · Private data: request_record · Public sink: reflect · Destructive: score, studio

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
